    About EUGY

    For children, from nature

    EUGYs are sustainable paper craft toys made from cardboard - one of the most recyclable materials! It comes with non-toxic glue. It’s safe for children and environmentally-friendly!

    Expanding minds

    Playing with EUGY is a great educational activity, helping children get familiar with counting numbers, enhancing concentration and motor skills

    Animals friends in your palm

    There are 100+ adorable animals in the EUGY range to choose from! Learn with ‘Fun Facts’ included about the animal model, too. It’s a perfect gift for kids or animal lovers to start an eco-friendly collectible

    Perfect family bonding activity

    Get together with your loved ones and have fun with this simple off-screen craft activity!

    A world's first, from New Zealand

    EUGYs are an original idea and the structure is patented in many countries. They're truly a unique toy designed in New Zealand, and proudly recognised by the NZ government

    In homes all around the world

    EUGY friends have been welcomed in homes all around the world! Bring Home Your Wild with our eco-friendly 3D puzzles today!

    Giving Back: Our Commitment

    Find out how we contribute to meaningful causes.

     Learn more

    Partners in Giving Back

    What EUGY friends say

    "This is Eli and Mabel, and we LOVE our EUGYs. We have 100 between us and are not done building. Eli’s favorite EUGY is the Raptor, Mabel’s favorite is the Chipmunk, Mommy’s favorite is the Fairy Wren and Daddy’s favorite is the Angler Fish!!!"

    -David, United States

    "I LOVE collecting EUGY animal puzzles!! They’re sooo cute and fun to build. Every time I finish one, it feels like I made my own little pet! My favourite is the stingray — it looks super cool and has a cute smile. I keep them on a shelf, and they make me smile every time!"

    -Esme Elston, Australia

    "We love collecting EUGY puzzles! Hermione: They’re all so detailed, like little works of art. My favourite is the colourful chameleon with its long tongue! Freya: Mine is the Welsh Corgi! It’s super cute with its little legs flying in the air, and I love seeing it come to life!"

    -Hermione and Freya Walker, Australia

    “My kids (4 and 6) have started to collect EUGY and these will be top of their birthday and Christmas lists for the next few years I imagine!”

    -Nicky Spicer, New Zealand

    “My son Rylee absolutely loves your idea! With his Autism & ADHD he often struggles to focus, but your product kept him happily engaged and I’m so amazed by it.”

    -Rox Davis, United Kingdom

    “Recently found your EUGY puzzles whilst holidaying in the South Island!! Bought 2 from a gift shop (shark and ptero). My 9 year old daughter and myself did the shark whilst freedom camping at Mount Cook 😊”

    -Jo Howard, New Zealand

    “We love how the packaging draws children in, making it fun to build a character that quickly becomes a wonderful 3D object. With its low environmental impact, this toy is something really special.”

    -William Treleaven, United Kingdom

    “My seven-year-old daughter built a display shelf for her EUGYs and is already planning more! EUGY has kept my daughter happily busy through lockdown.”

    -Elizabeth Fox, United Kingdom

    “Absolutely love your product. The new website looks amazing, so cute. I suffered a stroke a few years ago and your animals are a challenge, but a good one, wonderful therapy. My daughter and I build them together and it’s wonderful. So thank you.”

    -Samantha Owen, Australia

    “The support from dodoland at our school holiday programs allowed children with disabilities to experience the joy of building their own animals and taking them home to show Mum and Dad. One programme leader said, ‘The absolute joy on their faces was indescribable.’”

    -Ray Finch (COO of Spectrum Care), New Zealand

    137 Robin

    My granddaughter loved putting it together

    120 Capybara

    Beautiful. Easy to construct. I helped my Grandson with this project. Really good that you have guide slots to keep all pieces in place. Grandson is thrilled with it and will be taking it to school for show and tell.

    121 Kingfisher

    Love this cute little guy!

    021 Dolphin

    139 Axolotl
